text: As I navigate these sharply angular, brightly lit spaces, I feel a sense of surreal detachment, as if wandering through a modern labyrinth designed more for thought than comfort. The presence of research and development displays on the colorful wall beckons my curiosity, inviting me to reflect on human innovation amidst an environment that feels clinical yet imaginative. There is quiet here—an anticipation of discovery blended with a faint, existential solitude.
